W yiTC ^Tfl ip?4in I (3^«i/ff?a*i a>i .(MI) -- 3 of 6 -- 4 THE G A Z E T T I : OF INIJfA I X J K A D R D I N A k V JPAKI II Su bu\ 5T*W- 3 (Pnm ia iftr$ ^ tfr *nn* artta arftww * 3rarev*rsw fc^ *nn *1 we S <ti forfal m 3Tq fed *fl *OTT £ H Ml^i * * £ n ffffl* W 5 « « * ^ 3 1 ^ ^ * W f f l / « « (3*1 (3itti«/>trew *T *n'i) W « « a<ftd «Rl4iW W H : ( * l 9 < l 6 ) / 2 0 < M 4 * t | Iff- tf*t TWT, TfgVf u f a l MINISTRY O F COMMUNICATIONS AND INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY (Department of Information Technology) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27™ October, 2009 C . S . K . 778(EJ— I n exercise erf t h e powers conferred by dause (r) of sub-section (2) of Section 87, read with section 52 of the Information Technology Act 2000 (2t of 20O0). and in supersession of the Cyber Regulations Appellate Tribunal (Salary, Allowances and other lemis *nd conditions of service of Presiding officer) Rules. 2003. except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby maKes the following rule* regulating the terms and condrtions of the service of the Chairperson and Members of the Cyber Appellate Tribunal, n a m e l y : - 1 . Short title a n d commencement.—(1) These rules t r a y be called the Cyber Appelate Tribunal (Salary. AOowances and Other Terms and Conditions of Service of Chairperson and Members) R u f « 2009 (2) They shall come into force on the date o* their publications in the Official Gazette 2. Definitions.-* (1) In these rules, unless the context otherwise requires.— (a) ' A c t ' means Information Technology Act. 2000 (21 Of 2000); (b) "Cyber Appellate TribunaT means the Cyber Appelate Tribunal established under sub- section (1) of section 48 of the Act, (c) "Chairperson* means the Chairperson of the Cyber Appellate Trfcunaf appointed under section 49 of the Act; (d) "Member" means the Member of the Cyber appellate Tribunal appointed under section 49 of the Act: (2) All other words and expressions used and no: defined in these rules but defined in the Act shall have the meanings respectively assigned to them n the Act. 3. Salary and a l l o w a n c e * . — (1) The Chairperson and the Member shall be paid such salary and allowances, as are admissible to a Secretary to the Gove-nment of Jndia, including all the benefits that a Secretary is entitled to: -- 4 of 6 -- [*nn |]-i-lgflT3{i)] MTTH W\ THFTI : OTPITC^I * Provided thai in the case of appointment of a person as the Chairperson or the Member as the case may be, w h o has retired as a Judge of the Supreme Court of a High Court or w h o has retired from service under the Central Government or a State Government and w h o is m receipt of. or has received, or has become entitled to recetve any retirement benefits by way of pension, gratuity. employees contribution to Contributory Provident Fund cr other forms of retirement benefits, the pay of audi Chairperson or the Member, as the case maybe, shall be reduced by the gross amount of pension o r employer's contribution to the Contnbutory Provident Fund o r any other form o f retirement benefit, rf any, drawn or to be drawn by him: Provided further that In case a retired Judge of a Supreme Court or a High Court is appointed as the Chairperson or the Member, as the case maybe, the terms and conditions of service of such Chairperson or Member shall be in accordance with the instructions issued by the Ministry of Finance in respect of appointment of Judges to various Tribunals and m consultation with that Ministry 4. Leave.— The Chairperson and the Member shalf be entitled to leave as are appfceabte to the Secretary to the Government of India * i respect of earned leave, half pay leave, extraordinary leave. commutation of leave and casual leave. 5. Leave sanctioning authority.— The Secretary, Department of information Technology, Ministry of Communications and Information Technology. Government of India, shall be the authority competent to sanction toave to the Chairperson and the Member 6. Pension or Provident F u n d . — (1) In case a serving Judge of the Supreme Court or a High Court or a member of the Indian Legal Service is appointed to the post of the Chairperson or the Member, the service rendered in the Tnbunal shall count for pension, to be drawn in accordance with the rules of the service to which he belongs, and he shall also be governed by the provisions of the General Provident Fund (Central Services) Rules. 1960 (2) in all other cases, the Chairperson and the Member shall be governed by the provision of the Contributory Provident Fund (India) Rules. 1962. 7. Travelling a n d daily allowances,— The Chairperson or the Member, as the case may be, while on tour (Including the Journey undertaken on the expiry of his term in the Tribunal to proceed to his home town) s h a l be entitled to the travelling alowance daily allowance, transportation of personal effects and other similar matters at the same rates as are applicable to the Secretary to the Government of India. 8. Leave travel concession.—The Chairperson and the Member shall be entitled to avail leave travel concession $x the same rates as are admissible to the Secretary to t h * Government of India 9. Facility of conveyance.— The Chairperson and the Member shall be entitled to hire a taxi on wt>o(e time b e * * In accordance with the rules or orders ror the time being in force for hire of taxi by the Secretary to the Government of India 10. House rent allowance.—The Chairperson and the Member *hall be entitled to house rent allowance at the same rate as are, for the time being, admissible to Group "A' officers of the Central Government drawing equivalent pay and grade pay, 1 1 . Faculties for medical t r e a t m e n t — The Charperson and the Member shall be entitled to m e d i a l treatment and hospital facilities, as provided in the Central Government Health Scheme Rules, 19S4 and in place* where the Central Government Health Scheme Is not n operation, the said Chairperson and the Member shall be entitled to the facilities as provided in the Central Services (Medical Attendance) Rules. 1944, 12. Oath of office and s e c r e c y . * - Every person appointed as the Chairperson or the Member, as the case may be. shall, before entering upon his office, make at>($ s i * s c r i b e on oath of office and secrecy, in Form I and Form II respectively annexed to these rules. -- 5 of 6 -- 6 . T H E G A Z E T T E O F I N D I A : E X T R A O R D I N A R Y IPAKT I I — S I C . 3 f l ) | 13. Declaration of financial o r other I n t e r e s t — Every person, o n his appointment as the Chairperson or the Member, as the case may be. shall give a declaration i n Form III annexed to these rules, to the satisfaction of the Central Government that he does not have any such financial or other interest as is licely to affect prejudicially hts f u n d c n s as such Charperson or the Member, as the case may be. 14. Residuary p r o v i s i o n . — Any matter relating to the conditions of serv*cs of the Chairperson and the Member with w p e c t to which no express provision has been made in these rules shall be as per the rules applicable to the Group A* officers of the Central Government drawing equivalent pay and grade pay. F O R M - • (See rut* 12) Form of 0 * t h of Office for the Chairperson/Members ot the Cyber Appellate Tribunal L . having been appointed as the Chairperson'Member (cross out portion not appticapte) do solemnly Affirm and do swear in the name of God that I will faithfully and conscientiously discharge my duties as the ChairpcrsortfMember (cross out portion flot applicable), of the Cyber Appellate Tribunal to the best of my ab*ty. knowledge and judgement, without fear of favour, affection or ll*will. Dated: Place: (Name of the ChairpersortfMember) CYBER APPELLATE TRIBUNAL FORM - il (See rule 12) Form of Oath of Secrecy for the Chatrperson/Mcmbers of the Cyber Appellate Tribunal l4 , having been appointed as the Cha*person/Member {cross out portion not apptorawe} do solemnly affirm and swear in the name of God that 1 will not directly or indirectly communicate or reveal to any person or persons a n / matter u t i i c h shall be brought under my consideration or shall become known to me as the ChairpersoiV a Member (cross out portion not applicable), of the Cyber Appellate Tribunal except as may be reqmd for the due discharge of my duties as the Chairperson/ a Member ((cross out portion not oppiica&e). Doted Place (Name of the Chairperson/Member) CYBER APPELLATE TRIBUNAL F O R M - H I (See rule 15) Declaration against acquisition of any adverse financial or other interest I, . h a w g been appointed as the Chairperson/Member {cross out portion not applicable) of Cyttff Appellate Tribunal, do solemnly affirm and declare that I do not have, nor s h a l have m future any financial or other nterest which is likely to affect prejudicially my functioning as the Chairperson /Mempcr (cross out portion not apphcabto). of the Cyber Appellate Tnbunal Dated (Name of the Chaitpersorwem&ef > CYBER APPELLATE TRIBUNAL [No 9<16)/2004-EC) N RAVI SHANKER, J t Secy, -- 6 of 6 --
